shell.offline: Offline — changes will sync when reconnected
shell.outdated: A new version is required. Please refresh the app to continue syncing.

auth.inviteOnly: Sign-ups are currently invite-only. Contact the admin to request access.
auth.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}

home.noActiveSeasonText: Create a season before adding games.
home.noGamesText: Tap “+ New game” to score your first game.
home.deleteGameText: This will permanently delete the game and all its at-bats.

newGame.title: New game
newGame.noPlayers: No players on this team yet.
newGame.noStarters: No starters — move players from bench.
newGame.placeholderPlayers: Creates {{count}} placeholder players. You can fill in real names later.

game.endGameConfirm: End this game and mark it as final?

teamDetail.noSeasons: No seasons yet — create one in the Seasons tab.
teamDetail.noStats: No {{statView}} stats recorded yet for this season.

seasons.title: Seasons
seasons.noSeasonsText: Create a season to organise your games and stats.
seasons.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{name}}”? Games linked to it will keep their data.

stats.title: Stats
stats.noTeamsText: Add a team and record games to see stats here.
stats.selectTeam: Select a team to view player statistics.

league.createDesc: A league is your data container — teams, seasons, and games all live inside it.
league.title: League
league.clearData: ⚠ Clear local data & reload from server
league.removeMemberConfirm: This person will lose access to the league.
league.clearConfirm: This will wipe all local data and replace it with what is on the server.
league.refreshed: Local database has been refreshed from the server.

help.title: Help
help.gs1: Create a league — a league holds your teams, seasons, and games.
help.gs2: Add teams and their rosters under the Teams tab.
help.gs3: Create a season and mark it active under the Seasons tab.
help.gs4: Tap + New game on the Games screen to start scoring.
help.sc1: 1B  2B  3B  HR — base hits and home run.
help.sc2: BB — base on balls (walk).  HBP — hit by pitch.
help.sc3: K — strikeout.  FO — fly out.  GDP — grounded into double play.
help.sc4: RoE — reached on error.  FC — fielder's choice.
help.sc5: SAC — sacrifice bunt.  SF — sacrifice fly.
help.sc6: After each result, select the fielders involved (1–9 grid).
help.sc7: Move runners on the base diamond after each at-bat.
help.sc8: SB  CS  WP  PB  BALK — use the between-at-bat buttons on the base diamond screen.
help.sc9: Tap Undo at any time to step back.
help.ocr1: Tap the 📷 button on the Games screen to upload a photo of a written KNBSB scorecard.
help.ocr2: The app sends the image to an AI model which reads the scorecard and imports the at-bats.
help.ocr3: Review each inning on the review screen before saving — you can correct any mistakes.
help.stat1: Stats are computed live from the game log — no manual entry needed.
help.stat2: Batting: AVG, OBP, SLG, OPS, H, HR, RBI, BB, K and more.
help.stat3: Pitching: ERA, WHIP, IP, W, L, K, BB and more.
help.stat4: View stats per player or per team under the Stats tab.
help.sync1: The app works offline — all data is stored on your device first.
help.sync2: Changes sync to the server automatically when you're back online.
help.sync3: A sync indicator appears at the top of the screen if there are unsaved changes.
help.sync4: Use League Settings → Troubleshooting → Clear local data if something looks out of sync.
help.inv1: Go to League Settings and tap Invite scorer to generate an invite link.
help.inv2: Share the link with the scorer — they log in and are added to your league automatically.
help.inv3: Scorers can view and score games but cannot manage league settings.

admin.notAdmin: You are not a site admin.
admin.title: Site Admin
admin.inviteHint: Enter a name or label for this invite. The recipient chooses their own email when they follow the link.

signupInvite.canLogin: You can now log in with your email and password.

scorecard.title: Upload Scorecard
scorecard.description: Take a photo of a handwritten KNBSB scorecard. The image is analysed by AI and converted into a game log you can review and correct before saving.
scorecard.dragDrop: or drag and drop an image here
scorecard.howItWorksText: Your photo is sent securely to an AI model that reads KNBSB scorecard notation. You'll see the results on a review screen where you can correct anything the AI got wrong before the game is saved.

review.noData: No scorecard data. Please upload a scorecard first.
review.savedText: The scorecard has been added to your game log.
review.title: Review Scorecard
review.instruction: Check the at-bats below. Entries marked in red were unclear — please correct them before saving.
review.reviewNote: These are expanded automatically — review and correct before saving.
review.noAtBats: No at-bats recorded for this half-inning.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Score games play-by-play, track batting and pitching stats, and share live results — all from your phone.
onboarding.createLeagueDesc: A league holds your teams, seasons, and games. You can invite other scorers later.
